response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~13-15 years of experience, but the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory experience with cloud/AI customers. The resume shows only light, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025) and no evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership, principal-level influence, or building recognized AI products. Strong craftsmanship background does not bridge the gap to a Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated thought leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale this role demands
Lacks Director/Principal-level scope — career trajectory is senior IC, not strategic technical leadership
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority mismatch — senior IC vs. Director-level Principal
Breadth of engineering experience and OSS leadership
